payload.title: Verify iOS in Xcode: sync engine (SCP-135) + HubClient concurrency fix (SCP-104)
payload.description: Several iOS changes are code-complete but UNVERIFIED because there is no Xcode build in the dev environment: the offline sync engine (SCP-135) and the HubClient concurrent-use fix (SCP-104). Build the app under Swift-6 strict concurrency, run it against a running hub, and confirm: no Sendable diagnostics, relation-edge fetch works, sync engine pulls/pushes + handles renumber notices.
